EC2InstanceProfilePolicy._comment: Attached to cloudshelf-ec2-role. Grants EC2 instance identity to pull from ECR and write logs to CloudWatch: no hardcoded credentials needed on the instance.

Statement._comment: GetAuthorizationToken must be Resource * - it is an account-level API call, not repo-scoped
Scoped to cloudshelf-app repo only — least privilege for image pull
Allows EC2 to ship Docker stdout and bootstrap logs to CloudWatch

CICDUserPolicy._comment: Attached to cloudshelf-cicd IAM user. Scoped to ECR push only: used by GitHub Actions to build and push Docker images.

Statement._comment: GetAuthorizationToken must be Resource * account-level call
All push actions scoped to cloudshelf-app repo only: cannot pull, delete, or access other repos
